item.title: Version 1.5.0
item.description:
What's New in 1.5.0

Improvements

  • Smoother session handoffs — When a device reconnects after a brief drop, the Host now cleans up the old session right away so streaming resumes immediately, instead of leaving you stuck on a stale connection.
  • Friendlier messages when things go wrong — Connection errors sent to your devices now speak plain language instead of showing technical codes.
  • Audio streaming foundation — Improved the audio engine wiring so future audio features will be more reliable and easier to roll out.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed a rare crash that could occur when reading device name data from a connecting client.
  • Fixed multi-display mode sometimes reporting incorrect screen dimensions to connected devices.
  • Improved overall streaming stability under unreliable network conditions.
